title: MySpace Profile Update
text:
## MySpace Profile

**About me:** Currently {adjective} and obsessed with {adjective} bands.

**Mood:** {adjective}

**Music:** Anything {adjective} with loud {plural noun}.

**Heroes:** {person}, my {adjective} friends, and whoever invented {plural noun}.

**Interests:** {verb ending in -ing}, glitter, and taking {adjective} photos in the bathroom mirror.

**Top 8:** Updated — do not {verb} if you are not on it.

**New background:** {adjective} stars on a {color} background.

Comment if you want to join my {adjective} group!!! xoxo {person} :)
